title: helichrysum nebrodense
intro: Helichrysum nebrodense, also known as Sardinian everlasting or Sardinian strawflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's essential oil and extracts have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as wound healing, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits of promoting tissue repair, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum nebrodense, including essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, are commonly used in aromatherapy, skincare, and natural medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
